stemHtml: On the CDU of an FMS, the message "Insufficient Fuel" is displayed if…

options.a: the calculated estimated fuel at the destination airport is less than the fuel reserve value entered.
options.b: too little fuel is on board for diversion when the flight crew initiates a go-around procedure.
options.c: the fuel quantity falls to 25 % of the total capacity of the fuel tanks.
options.d: the refuelling process on the ground is stopped before the required amount of fuel is on board.
